extracted.title: ETNG MAD Notice -- LIFTED -- EFF 2/3
extracted.description:
Effective 9:00 AM CCT, February 3, 2026, East Tennessee (ETNG) is lifting its Maximum Allowable Delivery Service (MAD) issued January 24, 2026.

Please refer to the table below for the effected ETNG operational areas, dates, and tolerance percentages.

Operational Areas | Gas Day February 2 | Gas Day February 3 and until further notice
System Wide | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 2% / 500 | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 2% / 500
3200 Line for all meters between Tracy City and Topside including all meters on the 3500 Line | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 4% / 500 | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 4% / 500
3300 Line for all meters East of Rural Retreat on the 8" and 12" system (excluding meters on the 3600-1 line) | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 2% / 500 | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 2% / 500
Hourly Customer Specific Operational Flow Order | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe (See Posting for Effective Time / Tolerance Calculation) | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe (See Posting for Effective Time / Tolerance Calculation)
MAD | MAD In Effect; MAD 2% / 500 | No MAD

NOTE:
Deliveries No DP : Shippers are not to take more than scheduled
Deliveries No DS : Shippers are not to take less than scheduled
Receipts No DP : Shippers are not to give less than scheduled
Receipts No DS : Shippers are not to give more than scheduled

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
affectedLocations: 3200 Line for all meters between Tracy City and Topside including all meters on the 3500 Line
3300 Line for all meters East of Rural Retreat on the 8" and 12" system (excluding meters on the 3600-1 line)
